mapper.select: select * from emp2 where empno = 7369 and 1 != 1
select * from emp2 where lower(ename) like lower('%' || #{_parameter} || '%')
select * from emp2 where lower(job) like lower('%' || '${_parameter}' || '%')
select * from emp2 where job = #{job} or ename = #{ename}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp2 ( empno, ename, job, sal, mgr, hiredate, comm, deptno ) VALUES ( seq_emp2.NEXTVAL, #{ename}, #{job}, #{sal}, #{mgr}, #{hiredate}, #{comm}, #{deptno} )
mapper.update: UPDATE emp2 SET ename = #{ename}, job = #{job}, sal = #{sal}, mgr = #{mgr}, hiredate = #{hiredate}, comm = #{comm}, deptno = #{deptno} WHERE empno = #{empno}
